title: End of Evangelion DVD with different cover
display_title: End of Evangelion DVD with different cover
wikitext:
[]: End of Evangelion DVD with different cover?             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Fri Oct 25, 2013 8:33 pm I saw this on ebay and I never seen it before: http://www.ebay.com/itm/Lot-of-2-Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-movies-death-and-rebirth-The-End-of-Eva-DVD-/271303291005?pt=US_Wholesale_DVDs_Blu_ray_Movies&hash=item3f2aefb07d Does anyone know why the DVDs look so different?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Oct 25, 2013 8:53 pm They claim they are the original DVDs with reproduction artwork. However the artwork for their copy of The End of Evangelion makes me think that both are bootlegs or reproductions.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Oct 25, 2013 9:14 pm The back of the EoE cover is in Spanish and English and the left side is cut off while the front is Japanese. Certainly a very odd and poorly done hack job.

[]:             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Fri Oct 25, 2013 9:43 pm I guess people will bid on anything Eva related. They also have the movie box set on ebay, but that's $64.00.

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Sat Oct 26, 2013 8:54 am Princess Asuka wrote: They also have the movie box set on ebay, but that's $64.00.
